nodes.label: Wayvue Landing Page Video - cinematic hero footage of a dark green adventure SUV driving away down a curving mountain highway at golden-hour, kayak on roof rack and spare tire on the tailgate (branded with the Wayvue 'W' logo), pine forest and hazy layered peaks ahead

nodes.label: Wayvue Landing Page Animation - final chunk (frames 049-060) is a steady tracking shot following the loaded SUV road-trip scene, reinforcing Wayvue's road-trip / adventure travel brand identity; no overlaid UI text visible in these closing frames
